testcase.name: stubReaderReturnsOtherForUnmatchedUrl
testcase.system-out:

2026-06-24 19:40:07.998 [main] [N/A] [common] WARN c.h.a.e.read.a2a.StubDocumentReader - stub read-agent: no fixture matched url=https://random-unknown-host.example.com/page → returning doc_type=other
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): Class path contains multiple SLF4J providers. SLF4J(W): Found provider [ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.LogbackServiceProvider@1b2c4efb] SLF4J(W): Found provider [org.slf4j.simple.SimpleServiceProvider@c35172e] SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#multiple_bindings for an explanation. SLF4J(I): Actual provider is of type [ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.LogbackServiceProvider@1b2c4efb]

testcase.name: stubReaderDetectsSpaBlocked
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-24 19:40:08.593 [main] [N/A] [common] INFO c.h.a.e.read.a2a.HtmlDocumentReader - read_url: spa_blocked url=https://spa.bigmodel.cn/pricing readabilityTextLen=14 rawTextLen=0

testcase.name: readUrlToolSurfacesSpaBlockedDocType
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-24 19:40:08.689 [main] [N/A] [common] INFO c.h.a.e.read.a2a.HtmlDocumentReader - read_url: spa_blocked url=https://spa.bigmodel.cn/pricing readabilityTextLen=14 rawTextLen=0
